systemMessage:
You are working on AI Job Hunter — a local-first Electron desktop app (React 19, TypeScript strict, pnpm monorepo).

CRITICAL RULES:

1. NEVER call window.api.* in UI files (features/, routes/, components/). Always use service hooks:
   import { useDocuments, useJobQueue, useAIModels } from '@/services';

2. NEVER import from 'react-i18next' directly:
   import { useTranslation } from '@/lib/i18n'; // ✅

3. NEVER use inline motion transitions:
   import { transition } from '@/lib/motion';
   transition={transition.normal} // ✅ not {{ duration: 0.18 }}

4. NEVER hardcode brand hex colors:
   className="text-brand-soft bg-brand/15" // ✅ not text-[#c084fc]

5. ALWAYS use shared UI components:
   Button, Input, TextArea, SelectDropdown, ModalShell, GlassCard,
   EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton, StreamingText from @/components/ui/

6. ALWAYS use React Query via service hooks for data fetching — no useState+useEffect.

7. USE state machines for 3+ state flows:
   import { useMachine } from '@/hooks/use-machine';

FILE PLACEMENT:
- features/X/components/ → scoped to one route
- components/ui/ → shared across features
- services/ → all IPC + React Query hooks
- lib/machines/ → state machine definitions

NEW IPC CAPABILITY: contracts.ts → router.ts → preload → services/ hook

PACKAGE IMPORTS (renderer only):
✅ @ajh/ui, @ajh/shared, @ajh/prompts
❌ @ajh/core, @ajh/ai, @ajh/data, @ajh/workers (main process only)
